creator: Doug@gorean.org
text:
The t1lib port is out of date. Unfortunately the developers also
removed previous versions from their distribution sites. This port is a
dependency for xpdf, et al. Patch sent to -ports and MAINTAINER on 4/6 has
gone unanswered.

Fix: Apply the following patch. It will need updating for the recent
ports changes, but it's a simple upgrade.

How-To-Repeat: 
	DNA
